title: K-200 Battery Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Battery Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-425-C. Revision: C. Type: ICD. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2025-05-05. Last modified: 2025-07-04. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1137, P-1072, P-1153.
